title: Tax Examiners and Collectors, and Revenue Agents
description: Determine tax liability or collect taxes from individuals or business firms according to prescribed laws and regulations.

tasks.text: Send notices to taxpayers when accounts are delinquent.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with taxpayers or their representatives to discuss the issues, laws, and regulations involved in returns, and to resolve problems with returns.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Notify taxpayers of any overpayment or underpayment, and either issue a refund or request further payment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records for each case, including contacts, telephone numbers, and actions taken.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Contact taxpayers by mail or telephone to address discrepancies and to request supporting documentation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer questions from taxpayers and assist them in completing tax forms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect taxes from individuals or businesses according to prescribed laws and regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine appropriate methods of debt settlement, such as offers of compromise, wage garnishment, or seizure and sale of property.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Check tax forms to verify that names and taxpayer identification numbers are correct, that computations have been performed correctly, or that amounts match those on supporting documentation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine and analyze tax assets and liabilities to determine resolution of delinquent tax problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Impose payment deadlines on delinquent taxpayers and monitor payments to ensure that deadlines are met.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct service of legal documents, such as subpoenas, warrants, notices of assessment, and garnishments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review filed tax returns to determine whether claimed tax credits and deductions are allowed by law.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Maintain knowledge of tax code changes, and of accounting procedures and theory to properly evaluate financial information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Investigate claims of inability to pay taxes by researching court information for the status of liens, mortgages, or financial statements, or by locating assets through third parties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review selected tax returns to determine the nature and extent of audits to be performed on them.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine accounting systems and records to determine whether accounting methods used were appropriate and in compliance with statutory provisions.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Participate in informal appeals hearings on contested cases from other agents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare briefs and assist in searching and seizing records to prepare charges and documentation for court cases.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Enter tax return information into computers for processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Secure a taxpayer's agreement to discharge a tax assessment or submit contested determinations to other administrative or judicial conferees for appeals hearings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
